always_on.description: Services that must ALWAYS be running — never stop, auto-restart on crash

models.name: comfyui
models.description: AI Image Generation — Stable Diffusion/Comfy Workflow Engine

models.name: qwen35
models.description: PRIMARY AI MODEL — Hermes agent main model. Takes ~2 min to load. DO NOT STOP.
models.start_command: export VLLM_USE_V1=0 && export VLLM_NVFP4_GEMM_BACKEND=cutlass && nohup vllm serve $HOME/models/qwen3-35b-nvfp4 --max-model-len 131072 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.65 --kv-cache-dtype fp8 --port 45671 --trust-remote-code --enable-auto-tool-choice --enable-chunked-prefill --max-num-seqs 32 --enable-prefix-caching --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder > /tmp/qwen35.log 2>&1 &

models.name: qwen36-vllm
models.description: Qwen3.6-27B NVFP4 vLLM — 131k context, high performance. Primary for IDE/continue.dev usage.
models.start_command: export VLLM_USE_V1=0 && export VLLM_NVFP4_GEMM_BACKEND=cutlass && nohup vllm serve $HOME/models/Qwen3.6-27B-NVFP4 --max-model-len 131072 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.65 --port 45672 --trust-remote-code --enable-chunked-prefill --max-num-seqs 64 --enable-auto-tool-choice --enable-prefix-caching --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder > /tmp/qwen36-vllm.log 2>&1 &

models.name: gemma4
models.description: WebUI second model, GGUF via llama-server

models.name: webui
models.description: Main WebUI dashboard — connects to all models

models.name: odysseus
models.start_command: cd $HOME/odysseus && source venv/bin/activate && nohup python -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 12353 > /tmp/odysseus.log 2>&1 &

models.name: hermes
models.start_command: cd $HOME/hermes-webui && HERMES_WEBUI_HOST=0.0.0.0 HERMES_WEBUI_PORT=12363 HERMES_WEBUI_AGENT_DIR=$HOME/hermes-agent HERMES_WEBUI_STATE_DIR=$HOME/.hermes/webui HERMES_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/.hermes/config.yaml HERMES_WEBUI_SKIP_ONBOARDING=1 nohup $HOME/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python bootstrap.py --no-browser > /tmp/hermes-webui.log 2>&1 &

models.name: kanban
models.start_command: cd $HOME/hermes-agent && source venv/bin/activate && nohup hermes dashboard --port 12373 --host 0.0.0.0 --insecure > /tmp/hermes-dashboard.log 2>&1 &

models.name: agent-os
models.description: Mission Control — all agents, models, goals
models.start_command: cd /home/realmont/agent-os/source && PORT=12351 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 nohup npm start > /tmp/agent-os.log 2>&1 &

optional.description: Services that can be started/stopped as needed

models.name: paperclip
models.start_command: export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && nohup npx paperclipai run > /tmp/paperclip.log 2>&1 &

models.name: claude
models.start_command: cd /home/realmont/free-claude-code && nohup uv run fcc-server > /tmp/claude-proxy.log 2>cd $HOME/free-claude-code && nohup uv run uvicorn server:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 12342 > /tmp/claude-proxy.log 2>&1 &1 &

models.name: ollama
models.description: Ollama server — manages swappable models (llama, nemotron, qwen0.5)
models.start_command: export OLLAMA_HOST=127.0.0.1:23450 && export OLLAMA_MODELS=$HOME/.ollama/models && nohup ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 &
